original: Diverting Jokes and Jests, by Jaskel Nuch.\n\nA faded reader card encoded with an old compilation of Tarkus’s most popular jokes. It should still interface with your codex and translate correctly.

original: You scan the card into your codex. It beeps.\n\nA new codex entry under Fiction is available!
